ogTitle: Thulimbah vs Thuringowa Central: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thulimbah and Thuringowa Central.
heading: Thulimbah vs Thuringowa Central — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thulimbah, Queensland and Thuringowa Central, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thulimbah has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Thuringowa Central (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thulimbah or Thuringowa Central safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thulimbah has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Thuringowa Central scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thulimbah scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Thuringowa Central scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thulimbah or Thuringowa Central?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thulimbah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
